title: World-Editor+
description: A Fabric modpack focused on world editing, image importing, and enhanced building tools. Perfect for creators, builders, and large-scale projects.
body:
## 🌍 World-Editor+ A **Fabric** modpack focused on world editing, image importing, and enhanced building tools. Perfect for creators, builders, and large-scale projects. --- ### 📦 Mods
Main - [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) (MIT) - [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) (MPL-2.0) - [Image Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/image) (MIT) - [Image2Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/image2map) (MIT)
Addons - [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distant-horizons) (GPL-3.0) - [Litematica Printer](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica-printer) (MIT) - [LitematicaWand](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematicawand) (MIT) - [Toggleable Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggleableitemframes) (MIT) - [Full Brightness Toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-brightness-toggle) (MIT)
Performance - [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) (MIT) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (ISC) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) (MIT) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) (MIT) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) (MIT)
Extra - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) (GPL-3.0) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) (MIT) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (MIT)
Dependencies - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Apache-2.0) - [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) (MPL-2.0) - [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) (All Rights Reserved) - [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) (MIT) - [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) (MPL-2.0)
--- ### 💬 Messages > If I missed a mod in here, tell me on Discord: **fyve505** > ``` > Thanks so much for 2900+ Downloads. > Goal: 3000 Soo Close to 3k. > Last Updated Description on 15 June 2026 ```
